chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3847 of 2023 CP D 3848 of 2023 CP D 3849 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 17665/2023 2. For hearing of main case 25.02.2025 Dr. Shahnawaz Memon advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo, advocate for respondent Qazi Abdul Haleem Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General Per learned counsel, show cause notices have been impugned herein. He states that these notices are unwarranted as the lis has already been decided earlier by the department. Be that as it may, he states that the petitioner shall contest the notices before the issuing authority and he seeks directions to the department to determine the notices in accordance with law, vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. He further seeks that pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that these petitions may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
